status.description: Cancel only jobs in this status. One of: submitted, running, pending.

tool_name.description: Cancel only jobs recorded by this tool_name (e.g. 'submit_lsdyna_job').

project_like.description: SQL LIKE pattern matched against project_name (e.g. 'doe_%').

submitted_before.description: Unix epoch seconds. Cancel jobs whose submitted_at < this value.

registry_ids.description: Explicit list of registry primary keys to cancel.

dry_run.description: If true (default), list jobs that WOULD be cancelled but cancel nothing. Set false to actually scancel.
